_comment: Example config for cmd/source-producer. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

nats._comment: NATS JetStream connection. The producer publishes JobDiscovered events to the jobs.discovered subject in the JOBS stream.

sources._comment: Static source for local testing. It publishes the sample jobs below without calling an external job board.
sources.name: example-static

settings._comment: Each static job is normalized into one JobDiscovered event.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Build event-driven backend services in Go.

sources._comment: Greenhouse source example. Set enabled to true and replace board_token with a real Greenhouse board token.
sources.name: example-greenhouse

settings._comment: include_content=true asks Greenhouse for job description content when available.
